description: Vertical (960x1200) graphic with a soft pastel rainbow-tinted off-white paper background. In the top-left corner, bold white outlined italic capitals read 'LIVING OUR TRUTH' set against a fan of diagonal rainbow stripes. Top-right, in a clean sans serif, reads 'DHS celebrates' (gray) above 'LGBTQIA+ Pride' in rainbow-colored letters. Centered below is a circular photo portrait of a smiling person with short hair, glasses, and a dark button-up shirt, framed by a thick rainbow gradient ring. Below the portrait is a pull-quote with a large blue quotation mark: 'The month honors those who came before us, who took great risks, in some instances, sacrificing their own lives to stand up and advocate that LGBTQIA+ people are worthy of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness, just like everyone else.' Lower-left attribution in blue and gray reads 'Stacie S.' / 'USCIS, Immigration Services Officer II' / 'with DHS for 21 Years', preceded by a small rainbow vertical bar. Bottom-right shows the circular blue-and-white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal beside a row of rainbow-colored vertical brush strokes.
notable_text: LIVING OUR TRUTH; DHS celebrates LGBTQIA+ Pride; 'The month honors those who came before us, who took great risks, in some instances, sacrificing their own lives to stand up and advocate that LGBTQIA+ people are worthy of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness, just like everyone else.'; Stacie S., USCIS, Immigration Services Officer II, with DHS for 21 Years
